postData.contentHtml:
Prepare for an electrifying return as the metal giants, Killswitch Engage, have officially announced their monumental first headline tour across Australia and New Zealand, slated for 2026. This highly anticipated tour will see the band delivering their signature blend of melodic metalcore to fans Down Under and across the Tasman.

Adding to the excitement, English metal outfit Sylosis has been confirmed as special guests, joining Killswitch Engage for all dates on this landmark tour. Sylosis's technical prowess and aggressive sound are sure to complement Killswitch Engage's powerful performances, promising an unforgettable experience for attendees.

The announcement has already generated significant buzz among the metal community. Initial social media sentiment surrounding the tour is overwhelmingly positive, with fans expressing immense excitement and anticipation for the upcoming shows. While there's always some general discussion, the overall reaction indicates a strong demand for Killswitch Engage's return to the region.

Fans should keep an eye out for further details regarding specific tour dates, venues, and ticket information, which are expected to be released soon. This tour marks a significant event for metal enthusiasts in Australia and New Zealand, offering a rare opportunity to witness two powerhouse bands on one stage.
postData.title: Killswitch Engage Announces Highly Anticipated Australian and New Zealand Tour for 2026
postData.summary: Metal fans rejoice! Killswitch Engage is set to embark on their first-ever headline tour across Australia and New Zealand in 2026, bringing along English metal outfit Sylosis as special guests.

sources.title: Killswitch Engage Announce First Australian and New Zealand Headline Run in...
Killswitch Engage announce 2026 Australian and New Zealand tour
